name: JPMorgan Multi-Asset Growth & Income plc
summary: JPMorgan Multi-Asset Growth & Income plc is an investment trust that aims to provide investors with an attractive level of income, together with the prospect of capital growth, by investing in a diversified portfolio of assets, both directly and indirectly through collective investment vehicles. The trust invests across a range of asset classes, including equities, bonds, and alternative investments. The company is based in London, UK.
